status_notes: Initial sweep entry — not deeply researched.
notes: MSIT-affiliated quasi-governmental agency. Korea's national cybersecurity and internet-infrastructure agency — operates KrCERT/CC (secid:entity/krcert.or.kr, a distinct namespace for that operational program), certifies K-ISMS/ISMS-P and CSAP (secid:control/kisa.or.kr), and runs .kr domain/DNS and spam/incident-response functions.
